heroTitle: Edit your PDFs, right in your browser
heroSubtitle: Merge, split, rotate, delete, reorder and compress — free, and completely private. Your files never leave your device.
dropSubtitle: or click to browse your device
dropFootnote: You can add several files. Everything stays on your device.

recover.title: Restore your previous work?
recover.body: We found an editing session from {{time}}, saved on this device.

confirmReset.title: Start over?
confirmReset.message: This will discard your current session and take you back to the upload screen. This can't be undone.
